untranslatable_reason: Signal requires event-calendar detection (announcement timing and outcome uncertainty), minimum days-to-event filtering, and implied volatility (IV) level comparisons. Available indicators do not include event calendar data, explicit IV tracking (india_vix is VIX proxy, not option IV), or announcement detection. Signal also requires comparison of IV change from 'pre-announcement level' which requires baseline snapshots not available in standard OHLCV indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using india_vix as volatility proxy and returns for underlying price movement, but core signal logic (event-driven IV expansion without directional move) cannot be properly captured with available indicators. Thresholds remain as placeholders: [IV_RISE_THRESHOLD], [MAX_UNDERLYING_MOVE], [IV_CONTRACTION_LEVEL] would need manual calibration with event-specific data.
